---
title: Week notes (2026-W12)
date: 2026-03-20
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Finished coding an interview
- Worked on the emails analysis outline
- Participated in the MORPHSS catalogue launch event and panel discussion
- Gave a talk for the University of York's Digital Archaeology and Heritage seminar
- Submitted a manuscript relating to my PhD
- Finished a peer-review
- Various BibVik tasks
